chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. D-1876 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.1. 2. For hearing of CMA 9299/2025 3. For hearing of main case 16.09.2025 Ms. Fauzia Rasheed, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Zakia, advocate for the respondent. Under instructions, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition, which dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). Judge Judge M. Khan
